question: Which regions drove gross sales during the last two complete calendar months, using completed orders only?

time_range.label: May through June 2026, complete calendar months

answer: East drove the most completed-order gross sales in the synthetic May-June 2026 example at $128,000.

definitions.Gross sales: Sum of synthetic gross order amount before returns.
definitions.Region: Synthetic sales territory attached to each order.

notes: This walkthrough uses synthetic rows and does not connect to Snowflake.
The period is fixed so the acceptance journey remains deterministic.
